_comment: Captured 2026-05-02T23:15 against D:/gameDev/pong using harness commit 185d29c. Phase A reproduction of issue #52. Pong's match_controller.gd and hud_presenter.gd had 4 distinct push_warning calls inserted (DIAG-A and DIAG-B in MC._ready; one in MC._on_goal_right_entered which only fires on a goal; one in HudPresenter._refresh). The 30-frame fixture fired 3 of the 4 (the goal-handler one never fired in a 30-frame window). All 3 collapsed into ONE record showing the engine-side C++ emission point with repeatCount=3. Only the most recently captured message text survives (HudPresenter._refresh DIAG, the last one to fire); the two MC._ready messages are gone.
